intro: Every day is a battle. Every carriage is a gamble
description:
Stranded after a brutal train crash, your survival begins now.

You wake amidst twisted metal and shattered carriages, trapped between steep cliffs and a vast lake. With only your wits and determination, you must explore, gather, and fight to stay alive for 28 days — until rescue arrives.

Every decision counts. Every resource matters. Will you endure?

EXPLORE THE WRECKAGE
Search every train car for supplies, tools, and hidden loot. Some wagons are locked or contain only fragments of the gear you need, forcing you to combine parts and improvise to survive.

MASTER RESOURCE MANAGEMENT
Hunt, fish, forage mushrooms and berries, and collect wood. Keep fires burning, craft essential tools, and make every piece of salvaged material count.

CRAFT & SURVIVE
Build makeshift shelters, repair damaged gear, and create survival equipment from scavenged parts. Creativity and resourcefulness are the keys to lasting 28 days.

FACE THE WILD
The wilderness is dangerous — giant lizards and other predators lurk everywhere. Stay alert, defend yourself, and never underestimate the wildlife.

PLAN FOR THE 28-DAY CHALLENGE
Balance risk and reward. Explore further or stay safe. Every day brings hunger, cold, and new dangers — only careful planning and bold action will see you through.

Do you have the skill, patience, and grit to survive all 28 days?
